patch_notes: Replaced Q19 (was duplicate of Q16's 94% stat) with a different fact from the passages
language_standard: All vocab MCQ options English-only; explanations Arabic (B1 CEFR)

questions.question_text: Passage A says AI has become an 'integral' part of modern life. What does 'integral' mean?

options.text: Optional and only occasionally useful in daily situations
Essential and forming a necessary part of something larger
Rare and difficult to find in most everyday contexts
Simple and very easy to remove or replace

questions.explanation: integral تعني جوهري ولا يتجزأ، أي أنه جزء أساسي لا يمكن الاستغناء عنه من شيء أكبر.

questions.question_text: Educational platforms 'leverage' machine learning to personalise student experiences. What does 'leverage' mean here?

options.text: To ignore and fail to make use of available tools or resources
To design and build something entirely from the very beginning
To make effective and strategic use of something to gain an advantage
To reduce and limit the power of a tool or available resource

questions.explanation: leverage تعني يستغل ويوظّف، أي استخدام شيء متاح بذكاء لتحقيق ميزة أو نتيجة أفضل.

questions.question_text: The 'scope' of AI applications continues to expand rapidly across sectors. What does 'scope' mean in this context?

options.text: The speed at which a new technology is developed or officially released
The negative side effects that a technology causes in society
The total number of experts involved in designing a system
The range and extent of something's coverage or influence

questions.explanation: scope تعني نطاق أو مدى، أي الحدود أو الامتداد الذي يشمله شيء ما أو يؤثر فيه.

questions.question_text: Passage A states that AI accuracy in healthcare 'surpasses' the performance of many human specialists. What does 'surpasses' mean?

options.text: Performs better than or goes beyond an established level or standard
Falls below or fails to meet the required level or standard
Stays at exactly the same level as something else over time
Relies on and depends completely on another external source

questions.explanation: surpasses تعني يتفوق على ويتجاوز، أي تحقيق أداء أعلى من مستوى أو معيار معين.

questions.question_text: Passage A argues that AI works best when it 'complements' human intelligence rather than replacing it. What does 'complements' mean?

options.text: Competes directly against something in order to take its place
Adds to and strengthens something by supplying what it lacks
Copies and exactly reproduces the abilities of something else
Reduces and weakens something by gradually taking over its role

questions.explanation: complements تعني يكمل ويعزز، أي أن يضيف شيء ما إلى شيء آخر بحيث يملأ ما ينقصه ويجعله أكثر اكتمالاً.

questions.question_text: In the context of scientific research, 'breakthroughs' refers to major discoveries or important advances that change what was previously possible.
questions.explanation: صحيح. breakthroughs تعني اختراقات أو اكتشافات مهمة تُغيّر ما كان ممكناً من قبل في مجال ما.

questions.question_text: The 'adoption' of AI in Middle Eastern healthcare means that hospitals have completely refused to use AI technology.
questions.explanation: خطأ. adoption تعني التبني والاعتماد على شيء ما، أي قبوله واستخدامه، وهو عكس الرفض تماماً.

questions.question_text: Healthcare providers are _____ to balance technological innovation with the values of traditional patient care.
questions.explanation: striving تعني تسعى جاهدةً أو تجتهد، أي بذل جهد مستمر ومثابر من أجل تحقيق هدف معين.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses 'recently' correctly with the present perfect tense?

options.text: Researchers recently published their AI study in 2023.
The hospital recently installed the AI scanner last Tuesday.
Scientists have recently developed a more accurate AI model for detecting cancer.
She recently was working on the AI project for the past six months.

questions.explanation: نستخدم 'recently' مع الماضي التام (have/has + recently + تصريف ثالث) للتعبير عن حدث وقع قريباً دون تحديد وقت دقيق. الخيارات الأخرى تقرن 'recently' بأوقات محددة تستلزم الماضي البسيط أو تحتوي على تراكيب خاطئة.

questions.question_text: Choose the sentence that correctly expresses an ongoing action that started in the past and is still continuing now.

options.text: The team worked on the AI project since January and is nearly done.
The university has been offering AI courses for the past three years.
Students studied machine learning since 2020 and know it very well.
She has been learn about artificial intelligence since last month.

questions.explanation: نستخدم الماضي التام المستمر (have/has been + فعل مضاف إليه ing) للتعبير عن فعل مستمر بدأ في الماضي ولا يزال يحدث الآن. الخيارات a وc تستخدم الماضي البسيط مع since بشكل خاطئ، والخيار d يحتوي على خطأ في بنية الجملة.

questions.question_text: Which sentence best describes an action in progress over a period that is not yet finished?

options.text: Dr. Ahmed has studied AI for fifteen years and published many important papers.
The new AI system completed all its tests and is now ready to launch.
Researchers have been testing the new AI model for three months and are not finished yet.
Scientists discovered the key benefits of machine learning in the early 2000s.

questions.explanation: يُعبّر الماضي التام المستمر (have been testing) عن نشاط لا يزال جارياً لم يكتمل بعد. الخيار a يُبرز النتيجة المنجزة (PP بسيط)، والخياران b وd يستخدمان الماضي البسيط.

questions.question_text: Which question correctly asks about the duration of an activity that started in the past and is still continuing?

options.text: How long did she use the AI assistant for her research?
How long has she been using the AI assistant for her research?
How long was she using the AI assistant for her research?
How long she has been using the AI assistant for her research?

questions.explanation: نستخدم 'How long has/have + subject + been + verb-ing?' للسؤال عن مدة نشاط مستمر حتى الآن. الخيار a يوحي بانتهاء النشاط، والخيار c يستخدم الماضي المستمر المنتهي، والخيار d يحتوي على خطأ في ترتيب الكلمات.

questions.question_text: The sentence 'Doctors have been using this AI software since they installed it two years ago' is grammatically correct.
questions.explanation: صحيح. نستخدم الماضي التام المستمر (have been using) مع since للتعبير عن فعل بدأ في نقطة زمنية محددة في الماضي ولا يزال مستمراً حتى الآن.

questions.question_text: Match each verb to its correct past participle form, as used in the present perfect tense.
questions.explanation: هذه أفعال شاذة تتغير صيغتها في الماضي التام: rise→risen، break→broken، write→written، grow→grown. معرفة تصريفاتها الثالثة ضرورية لبناء جمل الماضي التام بشكل صحيح.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, which sector uses machine learning algorithms to create experiences that adapt to individual learning styles?

options.text: The healthcare sector through AI-powered diagnostic tools
The finance sector through automated fraud detection systems
The education sector through adaptive learning platforms
The urban planning sector through smart city infrastructure

questions.explanation: ذكر النص أن المنصات التعليمية تستخدم خوارزميات التعلم الآلي لإنشاء تجارب تعلم شخصية تتكيف مع وتيرة كل طالب وأسلوب تعلمه.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, with what accuracy rate can AI systems detect early signs of diseases such as diabetes and heart conditions?
questions.explanation: ذكر النص أن هذه الأنظمة تستطيع كشف العلامات المبكرة لأمراض مثل السكري وأمراض القلب بدقة تبلغ 94%، وهي نسبة كثيراً ما تتجاوز أداء الأطباء البشريين من حيث السرعة والدقة.

questions.question_text: Passage A says AI fraud detection handles transactions that would be 'impossible for humans to monitor manually.' What does this best suggest?

options.text: AI has completely eliminated financial fraud from the banking sector
Banks no longer employ any human staff to manage financial operations
AI handles data volumes and processing speeds that exceed human capacity alone
AI was specifically designed to permanently replace human workers in finance

questions.explanation: يُضمن النص أن الذكاء الاصطناعي في القطاع المالي يتعامل مع أحجام بيانات وسرعات معالجة تتجاوز الطاقة البشرية، مما يجعله أداةً تعزيزية لا بديلاً كاملاً عن الإنسان.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, Dr. Sarah Al-Rashid is a computer science professor at King Abdulaziz University.
questions.explanation: صحيح. ذكر النص أن الدكتورة سارة الراشد أستاذة في علوم الحاسب بجامعة الملك عبدالعزيز، ونقل اقتباساً مباشراً لها حول تكامل الذكاء الاصطناعي مع القدرات البشرية.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, only _____ percent of survey respondents over the age of 50 said they would trust AI diagnostic tools.
questions.explanation: ذكر النص في الفقرة الثالثة من النص B أن 45% فقط من المشاركين فوق سن الخمسين قالوا إنهم يثقون بأدوات التشخيص المعتمدة على الذكاء الاصطناعي.

questions.question_text: Match each name or organization mentioned in the passages to its correct description.

matching_pairs.right: institution where Dr. Al-Rashid works as a professor
Saudi plan that includes ambitious digital health transformation goals
Saudi urban project integrating AI for smart city planning
region where the AI trust survey was conducted

questions.explanation: ذكر النص هذه الجهات بوضوح: جامعة الملك عبدالعزيز (مؤسسة الدكتورة الراشد)، ورؤية 2030 (خطة التحول الصحي الرقمي)، ونيوم (مشروع المدينة الذكية)، ومجلس التعاون الخليجي (نطاق الاستطلاع).
